name: No Bake Cherry Cheese Pie
recipeIngredient: 14 oz sweetened condensed milk (not evaporated milk)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large mixing bowl, beat the cream cheese until fluffy.
2. Beat in the sweetened condensed milk until smooth.
3. Stir in the lemon juice and vanilla extract.
4. Pour the mixture into the prepared crust.
5. Chill for 3 hours or until set.
6. Top with the desired amount of pie filling before serving.
7. Refrigerate leftovers.
